name: Lucky Chocolate Chewies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. For the cookie dough, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla extract in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs to the creamed mixture and beat until incorporated.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda. Gradually blend into the cookie dough at low speed.
5. Stir in chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake one baking sheet at a time for 7 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are set but still soft on the edges. Do not overbake. Allow cookies to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet before removing them to the foil to cool completely.
8. For the frosting, combine shortening, icing sugar, milk, and vanilla extract in a medium bowl. Beat at low speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
9. Scrape the bowl and beat at high speed for 2 minutes, or until smooth and creamy. Add food coloring, a few drops at a time, until the desired shade of green is achieved.
10. Frost the tops of the cookies with a spatula.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
